title: Add LoopState interface, state variable, and update cleanup/status functions
summary: Added LoopState interface and state management to boomerang extension. Implemented: LoopState interface with iteration tracking, convergenceEnabled, summaries, and command context. Added loopState variable initialized to null. Updated clearState() to clear loopState on session start/switch. Updated boomerang-cancel handler to explicitly clear loopState after task cleanup. Enhanced updateStatus() to display loop progress (e.g., 'loop 2/5') and combined loop+chain progress. Added 6 tests covering loopState cleanup and status display. All 99 tests passing.
